figma.purpose: Show and hide additional content in an expandable section
notes: The closed state should expose the header text.
The opened state should expose the description/content region.

ItemTrigger.figmaNotes: Contains the header text and indicator

slots.name: itemContent
slots.description: Expandable content region below the header

figma.purpose: Display a contextual message banner with an optional icon, title, and description

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Optional SVG icon positioned on the left; triggers padding adjustment

notes: The root element has role='alert' baked in.
Icon is not an explicit prop — it is inferred from any SVG child via CSS :has() selector.

figma.purpose: Render a small inline label for tags, status indicators, or categorization
Navigation trail showing the user's current location within a page hierarchy

Link.figmaNotes: Clickable breadcrumb link; render inside Item

Ellipsis.figmaNotes: Truncation indicator for long breadcrumb trails

notes: Structure: Root > List > (Item > (Link | Ellipsis)) + Separator.

figma.purpose: Trigger an action or event

icon.description: Icon element displayed alongside button text

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Icon element displayed alongside button text

figma.purpose: Horizontal sliding content carousel with previous/next navigation and dot indicators

Previous.figmaNotes: Navigates to previous slide; styled as a text-variant Button

Next.figmaNotes: Navigates to next slide; styled as a text-variant Button

Dot.figmaNotes: Single dot indicator representing one slide

figma.purpose: Toggle control for binary or indeterminate selection

slots.name: indicator
slots.description: The checkmark or minus icon inside the box

notes: When checked is 'indeterminate', a Minus icon renders instead of a Check icon.

figma.purpose: Searchable dropdown combining a popover trigger with a command-style filtered list

Trigger.figmaNotes: Button that opens the combobox popover; shows placeholder when no selection

Content.figmaNotes: Popover content containing an embedded Command with search input and list

slots.name: emptyState
slots.description: Custom content shown when no results match

notes: Composes Popover + Command internally.
Trigger uses Button with iconPosition='end' and a ChevronsUpDown icon by default.

figma.purpose: Keyboard-accessible command palette for searching and selecting from a list of actions

Dialog.figmaNotes: Modal variant wrapping Root in a Radix Dialog overlay

Input.figmaNotes: Search input with a search icon prefix; auto-focuses when inside Dialog

List.figmaNotes: Scrollable list of command items and groups

Empty.figmaNotes: Shown when no items match the search query

Group.figmaNotes: Named group of items with an optional heading

Item.figmaNotes: Selectable command item; optionally shows an icon

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Icon element rendered before command item text

notes: Two modes: inline (Root) and modal (Dialog).
Built on the cmdk library.

figma.purpose: Calendar-based date selection component with styled navigation and day cells

MonthGrid.figmaNotes: The grid of weeks and days

notes: Navigation buttons use the button recipe with variant: 'outlined', size: 'sm'.
Most Figma usage will focus on root, month_grid, day, selected, and today slots.

figma.purpose: Slide-in panel overlay for displaying supplementary content from the edge of the screen

Content.figmaNotes: Drawer panel content; auto-renders Portal + Overlay

Header.figmaNotes: Styled div for drawer header section

Body.figmaNotes: Styled div for drawer body/main content

Footer.figmaNotes: Styled div for drawer footer actions

notes: Content auto-includes Portal and Overlay; consumers do not need to render them.

figma.purpose: Form layout and validation wrapper integrating react-hook-form with styled field components

Provider.figmaNotes: Wraps react-hook-form state + styled form element

Label.figmaNotes: Styled label for a form field

Description.figmaNotes: Helper text below a form field

Message.figmaNotes: Validation error message for a form field

figma.purpose: Composable input field system with variants for text, number, and date-picker modes

Text.figmaNotes: Standard text input with formatter, maxLength, and showCount

Number.figmaNotes: Numeric input with increment/decrement spin controls

DayPicker.figmaNotes: Date input that opens a DayPicker in a Popover

showCount.description: Show character count when maxLength is set

controls.description: Show increment/decrement buttons for number input

notes: Uses React context to propagate size/radii/styling to sub-components.
Status states (error/success/warning) are driven via data-status attribute.

figma.purpose: One-time password input split into individual character slots with optional separators

Group.figmaNotes: Container for a cluster of OTP slots

Separator.figmaNotes: Visual separator between slot groups (e.g. a dash)

notes: Typical structure: Root > (Group > Slot*) + Separator + (Group > Slot*).

figma.purpose: Horizontal menu bar containing nested dropdown menus with items, checkboxes, radio options, and submenus

Trigger.figmaNotes: Button that opens a dropdown menu

Item.figmaNotes: Standard menu item; supports insetLeft for alignment

CheckboxItem.figmaNotes: Toggle-able menu item with a check indicator

RadioItem.figmaNotes: Radio-selectable menu item with a circle indicator

SubTrigger.figmaNotes: Opens a nested submenu; shows chevron icon

Shortcut.figmaNotes: Styled span for keyboard shortcut hints (text property)

insetLeft.description: Adds left padding for alignment with items that have icons

figma.purpose: Alert/confirmation dialog that blocks interaction with the rest of the page until dismissed

Footer.figmaNotes: Styled div for modal footer actions

Action.figmaNotes: Primary action button that closes the modal on click

Cancel.figmaNotes: Cancel button styled as outlined variant; closes the modal

slots.name: body
slots.description: Modal body content between header and footer

notes: Content auto-renders Portal + Overlay.
Cancel button is auto-styled with button variant: 'outlined'.

figma.purpose: Floating panel anchored to a trigger element for displaying supplementary content

Content.figmaNotes: Floating panel; auto-renders Portal + Arrow with center alignment

notes: Content defaults: align='center', sideOffset=4, auto-renders Portal and Arrow.

figma.purpose: Visual indicator showing completion progress as either a linear bar or circular arc

Root.figmaNotes: Progress bar controller; manages context for shape and dimensions

Label.figmaNotes: Text label for the progress indicator

notes: Two rendering modes: shape='line' (linear bar) and shape='circle' (circular arc).
Built on react-aria ProgressBar, not Radix.

figma.purpose: Single-selection control for choosing one option from a mutually exclusive set

Item.figmaNotes: Individual radio button; auto-renders an Indicator circle inside

notes: Item auto-renders Indicator internally; children prop is discarded.

figma.purpose: Custom-styled scrollable container with themed scrollbars replacing native browser scrollbars
notes: Typical structure: Root > Viewport + Scrollbar(> Thumb) + Corner.

figma.purpose: Toggle control for switching between mutually exclusive options displayed as a segmented button row

Root.figmaNotes: Segmented control container; wraps Tabs.Root + Tabs.List

notes: Built on Radix Tabs. Each Option is a Tabs.Trigger under the hood.

figma.purpose: Dropdown selector for choosing a single value from a list of options

Trigger.figmaNotes: Button that opens the dropdown; auto-renders a chevron icon

Content.figmaNotes: Dropdown panel; auto-renders Portal + Viewport with popper positioning

Item.figmaNotes: Selectable option; auto-renders a check indicator when selected

figma.purpose: Visual divider line between content sections, supporting horizontal or vertical orientation
Draggable bottom/side panel for supplemental content, supporting nested sheets

Header.figmaNotes: Styled div for sheet header section

Footer.figmaNotes: Styled div for sheet footer section

Handle.figmaNotes: Drag handle bar at the top of the sheet

slots.name: body
slots.description: Sheet main content between header and footer

notes: Built on the vaul library (not Radix Dialog directly).
NestedRoot enables stacking sheets.

figma.purpose: Collapsible navigation sidebar with groups, menus, submenus, and collapsed-state tooltips

Root.figmaNotes: Main sidebar container; renders as a Drawer on mobile, otherwise as collapsible/fixed panel

Content.figmaNotes: Main scrollable content area of the sidebar

GroupLabel.figmaNotes: Heading label for a group (text property)

GroupAction.figmaNotes: Action button for a group; styled as a Button

MenuButton.figmaNotes: Clickable menu item button; supports tooltip when sidebar is collapsed

MenuAction.figmaNotes: Secondary action on a menu item; styled as a Button

MenuBadge.figmaNotes: Badge indicator on a menu item

Trigger.figmaNotes: Toggle button for collapsing/expanding the sidebar; styled as a text Button

Rail.figmaNotes: Thin icon rail visible when sidebar is collapsed to icon mode

isActive.description: Whether the menu item is currently active

tooltip.description: Tooltip content shown when sidebar is collapsed

slots.name: tooltip
slots.description: Tooltip content shown when sidebar is collapsed (on MenuButton)

notes: The most complex compound component. Provider must wrap everything.
MenuButton conditionally wraps content in a Tooltip (only visible when collapsed and not mobile).
Root dynamically switches: mobile renders Drawer; collapsible='none' renders non-collapsible.

figma.purpose: Range input control for selecting a numeric value within a min/max range

slots.name: range
slots.description: The filled portion of the track

notes: Supports multiple thumbs by passing an array to value/defaultValue.
Thumb and track sizes are independent variant axes.

figma.purpose: Multi-step process indicator showing progress through a sequence of discrete steps

List.figmaNotes: Container for step items (horizontal or vertical layout)

Trigger.figmaNotes: Clickable element to navigate to a step

Indicator.figmaNotes: Visual step indicator (number, icon, or loading state)

Content.figmaNotes: Content panel rendered when step is active

loading.description: Shows loading state on step indicator

disabled.description: Shows disabled state on step indicator

figma.purpose: Toggle switch for turning a single setting on or off

slots.name: thumb
slots.description: The circular handle that slides left/right

figma.purpose: Tabbed interface for organizing content into selectable panels

Trigger.figmaNotes: Clickable tab button that activates a panel

Content.figmaNotes: Panel content shown when its associated tab is active

notes: Each Trigger must have a value prop matching its corresponding Content's value.

figma.purpose: Multi-line text input field with resize control and status styling variants

resize.description: Resize direction: none, vertical, horizontal, or both

notes: Status states (error/success/warning) are driven via data-status attribute.

figma.purpose: Non-intrusive notification that appears temporarily to convey status or prompt action

Viewport.figmaNotes: Container where toasts are rendered; controls placement via variant prop

Icon.figmaNotes: Optional icon area for the toast

Action.figmaNotes: Button that performs an action and optionally closes the toast

slots.name: children
slots.description: Toast body content (Icon, Title, Description, Actions)

figma.purpose: Small informational popup that appears on hover or focus over a trigger element

Content.figmaNotes: Tooltip popup panel; auto-renders Portal + Arrow with center alignment

notes: Content defaults: align='center', sideOffset=4, auto-renders Portal and Arrow.
Typically used with Provider > Root > Trigger + Content.

figma.purpose: Hierarchical tree structure for displaying nested data with expandable branches and selection

BranchControl.figmaNotes: Interactive area of a branch (clickable row)

BranchText.figmaNotes: Text label of a branch node (text property)

BranchContent.figmaNotes: Container for child nodes within a branch

ItemText.figmaNotes: Text label of a leaf item (text property)

notes: Built on Ark UI TreeView.
Very granular sub-component structure allowing full control over branch and leaf rendering.

figma.purpose: Semantic heading (h1-h6) and paragraph text elements with responsive typography and color variants
notes: Barrel export of Heading and Paragraph components.
Heading: renders dynamic h1-h6 tag based on level prop.
Typography should be implemented as text styles using tokens, not as Figma components.
